ops.text: ccx vcs ship <paths> fails when a scoped path is an already-staged deletion: its internal `git add <path>` hits "pathspec did not match any files" for files git-rm'd before the ship. Deletion-only scoped ships are a legitimate pattern (config retirement sweeps); ship should stage deletions with `git add -A -- <path>` or equivalent instead of bare `git add`. Hit live in the cc-pool retirement lane (temp-clone A2 variant, 2026-07-20); workaround was git add -A + unscoped ship, safe only because the clone was single-purpose.
